sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const Hero = ({ data }) => (
{data.badge}

{data.titlePrefix} {data.titleAccent}
{data.titleSuffix}

{data.subtitle}

{data.primaryCtaText} {data.secondaryCtaText} {data.resumeCtaLink && ( {data.resumeCtaText || 'Download Resume'} )}
{data.stats.map(s => (
{s.number} {s.label}
))}
); export default Hero;
